svg.title: Spec Kit feature workflow with Confluence and Jira via MCP, maker and checker skills, and the LLM loop
svg.desc: The code assistant pulls the feature description from Confluence via MCP, runs the Spec Kit phases with maker and checker corporate-standard skills and an LLM agentic loop, writes tasks to Jira as tickets, pulls the ticket during implementation, and the developer closes the Jira ticket as the final human gate.
svg.text: ↻ agentic loop (write code, run tests, repeat)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the developer stay in the loop here')
sendPrompt('What is Spec Kit and its commands')
sendPrompt('What does the code assistant do here')
sendPrompt('What are the LLM calls and agentic loop here')
sendPrompt('How is Confluence used via MCP here')
sendPrompt('How is Jira used via MCP here')
sendPrompt('What are maker skills as corporate standards')
sendPrompt('What are checker skills as corporate standards')

svg.text: Spec Kit flow — collaboration tools, skills & the LLM loop
Developer, Confluence and Jira shown neutral · Confluence and Jira connect through MCP
